title: Age of Berk
description: An Modpack based around Isle of Berk
body:
Age of Berk is a modpack designed around the Isle of Berk mod that I created for a multiplayer server id: Age-of-berk.de.

Explore a new world, build exciting constructions with the Create Mod, and tame your own dragon.

The only limit is beyond the sky.

Dragons:

1. Terrible Terror
2. Deadly Nadder
3. Gronckle
4. Hideous Zippleback
5. Light Fury
6. Night Fury
7. Monstrous Nightmare
8. Skrill
9. Triple Stryke
10. Nightlight
11. Speed Stinger

Some mods have to be downloaded from curseforge please check the Changelog of the version you want to play!
